command.newFile.title: Create New File
command.newFileAtRoot.title: Create New File at Path
config.templates.description: Map simple glob patterns to initial file content. Available variables: ${name} (file stem without the final extension), ${basename} (full filename), ${ext} (final extension including the leading `.`), ${dir} (workspace-relative parent directory, or `.`), ${workspaceFolder} (absolute workspace root path), and ${date} (local date in YYYY-MM-DD). Patterns without `/` match the basename only; patterns with `/` match the workspace-relative path. First matching pattern wins. Supports `*` (within one path segment) and `**` (across segments).
config.respectGitignore.description: Use git to discover directories, respecting .gitignore. When disabled, all directories are shown regardless of .gitignore rules.
config.notifyOnCreate.description: Show a notification after files or folders are created.
config.openAfterCreate.description: Which files to open in the editor after creation.
